subject: Re: Fwd: Warranty
body:
yes

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

> FYI.  Do you want Craig to monitor the build?
>  
> Darren
> > From: "Craig" <Craig@penumbramarine.com>
> To: <DKIESQ@aol.com>
> Subject: RE: Warranty
> Date: Wed, 8 Mar 2006 15:49:34 -0500
> 
> If you proceed with this, I can go down during the
> build and send progress
> photos to you.  Will Larry also be coming down from
> time to time?  If so, we
> can go together.  I want this one to be RIGHT!
> 
>  
> 
> Regards,
> 
>  
> 
> Craig Tafoya
> 
>  
> 
> Penumbra Marine Logistics
> 
> (954) 791-9992 Office
> 
> (954) 328-6203 Mobile
> 
>   _____  
> 
> From: DKIESQ@aol.com [mailto:DKIESQ@aol.com] 
> Sent: Wednesday, March 08, 2006 3:28 PM
> To: Craig@PenumbraMarine.com
> Subject: Re: Warranty
> 
>  
> 
> Will we get the warranty worded into the terms and
> conditions?
> 
>  
> 
> What happened to the $275,000 price we were quoted?
> 
>  
> 
> Here is the list of options that we would like on
> the final quote:
> 
>  
> 
> Icom VHF
> 
> Air Conditioning/Polar Air
> 
> Mase Gentor Diesel, Model 7.6, 7.6 kw, 6.6
> continuous kw
> 
> Night Vision Rayethear
> 
> Bow Light (set)
> 
> Three of the Underwater Lights
> 
> Set of Courtesy Lights
> 
> Depth Sounder Digital Installed
> 
> Dive Tank Holder, Fold down
> 
> Gannin 188i GPS Plotter/Sounder
> 
> Mooring Post Aluminum
> 
> O/B Motor Guard (says 18' to 25' does this mean that
> it is not available
> with or that it is 
> 
>         standard with the 41'?  If not available,
> what alternative is
> their?)
> 
> Step, large, bow, with fold-down  cleat (25' to 41'
> - I assume that this
> means that it is an 
> 
>         available option for the 41' model)
> 
> 2 Remote Control Spotlights installed
> 
> Note that We wish to supply AM/FM Stereo CD Player.
> 
> RL 70C Raymarine Radar
> 
> RC 400 Raymarine GPS Chartplotter. 
> 
>  
> 
> Please have Nautica prepare final quote for the
> vessel with these options,
> to the extent 
> 
> available (see, e.g., my question regarding O/B
> motor guard above).  Make
> sure that limited warranty is included with quote
> and see what you can do
> about getting them to stick to their original base
> price.  Then get me the
> whole thing for submission to JEE.  I note that JEE
> is purchasing a
> significant amount of options.  I am sure that
> Nautica can cut us a better
> deal as a result.  Don't forget to make sure that
> Nautica properly
> re-evaluates delivery time, because I want JEE to
> have accurate delivery
> estimates before he signs.
> 
>  
> 
> Thanks.Craig
> 
>  
> 
> Darren
> 
> 


__________________________________________________

body_html:
yes

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

FYI. Do you want Craig to monitor the build?

Darren

From: "Craig" Craig@penumbramarine.com
To: DKIESQ@aol.com
Subject: RE: Warranty
Date: Wed, 8 Mar 2006 15:49:34 -0500

If you proceed with this, I can go down during the
build and send progress
photos to you. Will Larry also be coming down from
time to time? If so, we
can go together. I want this one to be RIGHT!

Regards,

Craig Tafoya

Penumbra Marine Logistics

(954) 791-9992 Office

(954) 328-6203 Mobile

From: DKIESQ@aol.com [mailto:DKIESQ@aol.com]
Sent: Wednesday, March 08, 2006 3:28 PM
To: Craig@PenumbraMarine.com
Subject: Re: Warranty

Will we get the warranty worded into the terms and
conditions?

What happened to the $275,000 price we were quoted?

Here is the list of options that we would like on
the final quote:

Icom VHF

Air Conditioning/Polar Air

Mase Gentor Diesel, Model 7.6, 7.6 kw, 6.6
continuous kw

Night Vision Rayethear

Bow Light (set)

Three of the Underwater Lights

Set of Courtesy Lights

Depth Sounder Digital Installed

Dive Tank Holder, Fold down

Gannin 188i GPS Plotter/Sounder

Mooring Post Aluminum

O/B Motor Guard (says 18' to 25' does this mean that
it is not available
with or that it is 

    standard with the 41'?  If not available,

what alternative is
their?)

Step, large, bow, with fold-down cleat (25' to 41'

  • I assume that this
    means that it is an 

      available option for the 41' model)

2 Remote Control Spotlights installed

Note that We wish to supply AM/FM Stereo CD Player.

RL 70C Raymarine Radar

RC 400 Raymarine GPS Chartplotter.

Please have Nautica prepare final quote for the
vessel with these options,
to the extent

available (see, e.g., my question regarding O/B
motor guard above). Make
sure that limited warranty is included with quote
and see what you can do
about getting them to stick to their original base
price. Then get me the
whole thing for submission to JEE. I note that JEE
is purchasing a
significant amount of options. I am sure that
Nautica can cut us a better
deal as a result. Don't forget to make sure that
Nautica properly
re-evaluates delivery time, because I want JEE to
have accurate delivery
estimates before he signs.

Thanks.Craig

Darren
